## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem or limitation that motivates this request. -->

<!-- Describe clearly what you'd like to see implemented. -->


## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you thought about other approaches? If so, list them briefly. -->


## Use Case
<!-- Who benefits from this feature and how? -->
<!-- Ex: "As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit]." -->


## Additional Context
<!-- Add mockups, screenshots, links, or any other relevant info. -->
